  • Method Details

    • inject

      public IInjectLog inject(String pref) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Description copied from class: CachedPreferenceMap
      Loads the cache with elements created from the given string parameter.

      If inject fails, an IllegalArgumentException is thrown.

      Specified by:
      inject in interface ITacticProfileCache
      Overrides:
      inject in class CachedPreferenceMap<ITacticDescriptor>
      Parameters:
      pref - the information to load the cache with
      Returns:
      a log with errors and warnings about encountered problems
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - in case of failure
